title: Orlando, FL
html:
Orlando, FL

Tourist-corridor Florida city Yahir visited in March 2021 (age 17, peak-COVID solo-ish trip). Anchor stops in the corpus: Gatorland, BJ's on International Drive, Florida Mall as bus transfer point. The March 13 booking note dates the planning; the March 25 bus routes note documents the in-trip navigation by public transit (Westlake 42 to airport, route 108 to Cypress Crossing).

A scrappy travel proto-instance: Yahir refused rideshare premiums and bus-hopped his way through Orlando, eating 1:47 hours of total transit time per leg.
